narratives.summary: Started confident, hands-off; shifted to supervising after unexpected file changes.
expectations: agent handles most of the work

citations.quote: I couldn't tell what the agent had changed, so I opened every file to check.

narratives.summary: Cautious verifier; trusted the plan but not the done status until tests passed.

citations.quote: it said it was done but I didn't trust that until I ran the tests myself.

narratives.summary: Impatient under waiting; relaxed once a diff made the change legible.

citations.quote: the diff view finally showed me what happened and I relaxed.
